name: Asparagus and Prosciutto Bundles
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 ozs goat cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the stalks from asparagus, leaving 2 inches long tips.
2. Cook the tips in a large pot of boiling salted water until just crisp-tender, about one minute. Drain.
3. Transfer to paper towels; drain well.
4. Blend goat cheese, basil, pine nuts, water, and orange peel in a small bowl. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Spread a scant 1 teaspoon of filling over each prosciutto strip.
6. Arrange 2 asparagus tips atop the filling at the short end of the prosciutto.
7. Roll up the prosciutto, enclosing the base of the asparagus. Press to seal.
